englishDefinitions: To accept a woman or girl again after a breakup, argument, or separation.
To return a woman or girl to a place where she was before.
persianTranslation: دوباره با او رابطه را شروع کردن
examples: After their big fight, he decided to take her back.
She cheated on him, but he still wanted to take her back.
Can you take her back to the hotel after dinner?
